query:
SELECT e.name, e.code, e.neighborhood, COUNT(mi.id) as total_items
FROM establishments e
LEFT JOIN menu_items mi ON mi.establishmentId = e.id
WHERE e.id = 30002
GROUP BY e.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT e.name, e.code, e.neighborhood, COUNT(mi.id) as total_items
FROM establishments e
LEFT JOIN menu_items mi ON mi.establishmentId = e.id
WHERE e.id = 30002
GROUP BY e.id;
